en.extract:
The turquoise flycatcher (Eumyias panayensis), also known as the island flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.  It is found in Indonesia and the Philippines.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''turquoise flycatcher''' ('''''Eumyias panayensis'''''), also known as the '''island flycatcher''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].  It is found in [[Indonesia]] and the [[Philippines]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
